lanes.name: ui-codegen-core
lanes.objective: Implement first-pass React TSX screen code generation from parsed screen IR with source trace metadata.
deliverables: Add UI codegen module under src/migrator/
Add CLI entrypoint for UI code generation
Generate deterministic output paths and file names
Add tests for generated TSX structure and source trace comments

lanes.name: preview-manifest-sync
lanes.objective: Wire generated UI outputs into preview-host manifest/registry so converted screens can be opened directly in browser.
deliverables: Add manifest generation/update utility for generated screens
Ensure registry contract resolves generated entry modules
Document local dev verification flow for generated outputs
Add tests for manifest/registry synchronization behavior

lanes.name: api-script-tx-sync
lanes.objective: Stabilize ScriptTransactionCall integration into API mapping artifacts with collision-safe route/service naming.
deliverables: Extend mapping strategy for ScriptTransactionCall endpoint normalization
Add deterministic duplicate handling policy in report output
Strengthen unit tests using script-derived transactions
Update TECH_SPEC section for API mapping rules
